name: Aman Pandey
summary: High-performing Java Full Stack Developer with 4.5+ years of experience in SDLC, Agile, and building scalable web applications. Strong in Java, Spring Boot, React, AWS, and database design.

Designed user-friendly form fields using React Hooks.
